description: Add deployment query and scoping flags to show, list, and tag commands to match Go CLI filtering capabilities. Wire --namespace, --network, and --no-fork into show command, and wire existing tag --namespace/--network clap fields into runtime behavior.

userStories.title: Add --namespace, --network, and --no-fork Flags to show Command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want --namespace, --network, and --no-fork clap fields on the show command so that the parser accepts deployment query scoping flags (parser-only, no runtime wiring yet).
acceptanceCriteria: treb show --namespace mainnet --network 42220 --no-fork MyContract parses without error
treb show --namespace mainnet MyContract parses (each flag is optional)
treb show --no-fork MyContract parses
treb show MyContract still works (backward compat, no flags required)
show does NOT have -s/-n short flags (matching Go behavior)
parse_cli_from(...) unit test in main.rs pins the new flag parsing
--namespace, --network, --no-fork added to build_show() in build.rs for shell completions
Typecheck passes: cargo check -p treb-cli

userStories.title: Wire show Flags into Deployment Resolution and Filtering
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want show --namespace, --network, and --no-fork to filter deployments at runtime so that I can scope deployment lookups to specific namespaces, networks, and exclude fork deployments.
acceptanceCriteria: treb show --namespace mainnet MyContract resolves only within mainnet/ namespace
treb show --network 42220 MyContract resolves only within chain 42220 deployments
treb show --no-fork MyContract skips any fork/-prefixed deployments
Flags compose: --namespace mainnet --network 42220 --no-fork applies all three filters with AND logic
Error message includes active filter context when no match found (e.g. no deployments found in namespace 'mainnet' on network '42220')
--json output still works with all new flags
Reuse network_matches() from list.rs or extract to shared module rather than duplicating
Typecheck passes: cargo check -p treb-cli

userStories.title: Wire tag --namespace and --network into Runtime Handler
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want tag --namespace and --network flags to scope tag operations (show/add/remove) so that tag mutations target the correct deployment when names are ambiguous across namespaces or networks.
acceptanceCriteria: treb tag --namespace mainnet MyContract resolves MyContract only within mainnet/
treb tag --add v2 -s mainnet -n 42220 MyContract adds tag scoped to mainnet/42220
treb tag --remove v2 --namespace mainnet MyContract removes tag scoped to mainnet
When no namespace/network flags provided, behavior is unchanged (full registry scope)
Typecheck passes: cargo check -p treb-cli

userStories.title: Update Golden Tests and Help Snapshots
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden test snapshots updated for the new show flags so that CI stays green and help output is accurately captured.
acceptanceCriteria: show --help output includes --namespace, --network, --no-fork in golden snapshot
All existing golden tests pass without unrelated changes
Root treb --help golden snapshot updated if show help line changed
cargo test -p treb-cli passes (all golden comparisons match)

userStories.title: Add Integration Tests for Query Flag Filtering Behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests verifying runtime filtering behavior of show and tag flags against seeded registry data so that filtering correctness is regression-tested.
acceptanceCriteria: show --namespace filter test: verifies resolution scoped to namespace and errors when contract exists in another namespace but not the filtered one
show --network filter test: verifies resolution scoped to chain ID
show --no-fork filter test: verifies fork/-prefixed deployments are excluded
show combined filters test: verifies --namespace X --network Y --no-fork composes correctly
tag --namespace and --network filter tests: verifies scoped tag add/remove operations
Tests use subprocess execution and seed_registry() or seed_go_compat_registry() fixtures
Tests verify both success and error cases
cargo test -p treb-cli passes
